item.title: 6999 元起，三星 S26 系列正式发布
item.guid: 6999-元起，三星-S26-系列正式发布
item.description:
Early this morning, Samsung officially released its latest generation flagship Galaxy S26 series. Let's look at the prices first: 今天凌晨，三星正式发布旗下最新一代旗舰 Galaxy S26 系列，先看售价：

    Galaxy S26 is priced at 6999 yuan, offering one version with 12GB+256GB; S26+ starts at 7999 yuan, offering 12GB+256GB/512GB;

    The Galaxy S26 Ultra starts at 9999 yuan, offering 12GB+256GB/512GB and 16GB+1TB, with a maximum price of 13999 yuan;

    The Galaxy Buds 4 series, released alongside, is priced at 1399 yuan for the standard version and 1899 yuan for the Pro version.

Regarding highlights, the Galaxy S26 Ultra features "privacy screen" technology: the new phone can achieve two levels of hardware privacy protection in system settings, and the privacy screen can also achieve "local masking." 亮点方面，Galaxy S26 Ultra 给出了「防窥屏」技术：新机可以在系统设置里实现两档强度的硬件防窥，并且隐私屏幕可以实现「局部遮蔽」。

Technically, this technology originated from the Flex Magic Pixel exhibited at MWC 2024 – by separately depositing "wide-angle pixels" and "narrow-angle pixels" on the screen substrate, it simultaneously solves the two previously coexisting problems of "privacy protection" and "large brightness attenuation range." 技术上来看，这项技术脱胎于 2024 年 MWC 上展出的 Flex Magic Pixel——通过在屏幕基板上分别蒸镀「广视角像素」和「窄视角像素」，同时解决了「防窥」和「亮度衰减范围大」两个以往共存的问题。

In other aspects, the S26 series is, without a doubt, equipped with the customized Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 for Galaxy; however, there are also rumors that the latest Exynos 2600 processor will make a comeback in the Korean standard version of the S26. 其他方面，S26 系列毫无悬念地搭载了定制版骁龙 8 Elite Gen 5 for Galaxy；但也有消息称，最新的 Exynos 2600 处理器将在韩版 S26 标准版上重出江湖。

Additionally, the Samsung S26 series in China fully supports dual physical SIM card slots and eSIM. It comes in six color options: Phantom Violet, Snow White, Cosmic Black, Light Cloud Blue, and two Samsung direct sales platform exclusive colors, Sunset Gold and Moonlight Silver. 此外，三星 S26 系列国行全系支持双实体卡槽，同时支持 eSIM，共推出六款配色，分别为幽夜紫、映雪白、旷宇黑、浅云蓝，以及两款三星直销平台专属色的绯霞金与镜月银。

🔗 Related reading: Samsung Galaxy S26 Series Released: Starting from 6999 Yuan! Smart AI, Practical Privacy Protection 🔗 相关阅读： 三星 Galaxy S26 系列发布：6999 元起！AI 很聪明，防窥接地气

item.title: 腾讯元宝就辱骂用户道歉
item.guid: 腾讯元宝就辱骂用户道歉
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, during the Spring Festival, a lawyer surnamed Xiang from Xi'an received images containing abusive text when using the Tencent Yuanbao App to generate New Year's greeting posters. 据界面新闻消息，来自西安的向律师春节期间使用腾讯元宝 App 生成拜年海报时，竟收到含辱骂文字的图片。

According to the party involved, on New Year's Eve, he saw everyone posting golden Moments, so he downloaded Yuanbao to try it out. The report states that to create a New Year's greeting image suitable for his legal profession, the party involved sent instructions to Yuanbao multiple times, without using any prohibited words or suggestive language, only repeatedly requesting modifications due to dissatisfaction with the generated results. 据当事人描述，除夕夜时，他看到大家都在发金色朋友圈，便也下载元宝尝试。报道称，当事人为制作贴合律师职业的拜年图，先后多次向元宝发送指令，全程未使用违禁词或诱导性表述，仅因对生成效果不满多次提出修改需求。

Although the initially generated images did not meet expectations but were normal in content, after he commented "What the hell is this design?", the newly generated poster retained the original portrait and elements like auspicious clouds and golden light, but the blessing message was replaced with abusive text, causing him unexpected offense during the holiday. 初期生成的图片虽未达预期但内容正常，直至他反馈「你这是设计的什么鬼」后，新生成的海报保留了原有形象照和祥云、金光等元素，祝福语却被替换为辱骂文字，让其在节日期间遭遇意外冒犯。

On February 24, Tencent Yuanbao's official account replied to the above content, stating, "We are very sorry for the bad experience. Upon verification, this situation was caused by an abnormal output from the model when processing multi-turn conversations." Yuanbao stated that it has urgently corrected the relevant issues and optimized the experience. 2 月 24 日，腾讯元宝官方账号在上述内容下回复称，「非常抱歉给您带来不好的体验。经核实，该情况是由模型在处理多轮对话时输出的异常结果导致。」元宝方面表示，已紧急校正了相关问题并优化体验。

According to reports, this is not the first time Yuanbao has "cursed" people. Earlier this year, some netizens reported receiving insulting replies such as "get lost" and "can't you adjust it yourself?" multiple times when using the app to optimize code. At that time, the official also apologized, citing "abnormal model output under a small probability," and promised to initiate internal investigation and optimization. 而据报道，这已不是元宝第一次「骂人」。今年年初，曾有网友反馈使用该 App 优化代码时，多次收到「滚」「自己不会调吗」 等侮辱性回复，当时官方同样以「小概率下的模型异常输出」为由致歉，并承诺启动内部排查优化。

item.title: 投资 50 亿元，刘强东宣布造游艇
item.guid: 投资-50-亿元，刘强东宣布造游艇
item.description:
According to "Zhuhai Release," the Zhuhai Municipal Government and Tanhai Yacht signed the "Strategic Cooperation Framework Agreement for the High-end Yacht Industry Base Project" on February 24, with a planned total investment of approximately 5 billion yuan. 据「珠海发布」消息，珠海市政府与探海游艇于 2 月 24 日，签署《高端游艇产业基地项目战略合作框架协议》，项目计划总投资额约 50 亿元。

Notably, Liu Qiangdong, founder and chairman of the board of JD.com, attended the project signing ceremony as the actual controller of Tanhai Yacht. 值得关注的是，京东集团创始人、董事局主席刘强东以探海游艇实控人身份出席了项目签约仪式。

According to "21st Century Business Herald," Liu Qiangdong stated at the scene that his energy would still primarily be focused on JD.com. However, he also responded to the 5 billion yuan total investment, saying, "Only this way can we compete with the world's top yacht manufacturing companies in Europe and America." 据「21 世纪经济报道」，刘强东在现场指出，自己的精力仍将主要放在京东集团。但同时他也针对 50 亿的总投资额做出回应，「这样才能够去跟欧美全球顶级的游艇制造公司竞争。」

He revealed that he is committed to building 100% new energy yachts and hopes to lead the industry in the future to produce yachts costing around 100,000 yuan, "allowing yachts to enter thousands of households just like cars." 他透露，将致力于打造百分之百的新能源游艇，并希望未来能带动行业造出 10 万元级别的游艇，「让游艇像汽车一样进入千家万户。」

According to Southern Metropolis Daily, Liu Qiangdong revealed that after communicating his ideas with many foreign friends, based on their personal trust in him, he has already received orders for five large yachts, with each vessel selling for an average of 60 million euros (approximately 485 million RMB). 另据南方都市报报道，刘强东透露，他将自己的理念跟很多国外的朋友沟通后，基于对他个人的信任，他已经接到了五条大型游艇的订单，每艘船平均卖 6000 万欧元（约合人民币 4.85 亿元）。

item.title: 魅族被曝手机业务已实质性停摆
item.guid: 魅族被曝手机业务已实质性停摆
item.description:
Meizu 22

According to Jiemian News, Meizu's mobile phone business has effectively ceased operations and will officially delist in March 2026. 据界面新闻消息，魅族手机业务已经实质性停摆，将于 2026 年 3 月正式退市。

Additionally, Meizu's FlymeAuto in-car system business will operate independently, and the Meizu brand may continue to be retained within the Geely system. It is reported that the Starry Meizu Feishu group currently has over 1,000 members, but many employees have resigned, and a small number have transferred to Zeekr Auto within the Geely system. 此外，魅族旗下 FlymeAuto 车机业务将独立运营，魅族品牌或将继续保留在吉利体系内。据悉，星纪魅族的飞书大群目前还剩 1000 多人，但有不少员工已提出离职，少量员工已转岗至吉利体系内的极氪汽车。

Reports indicate that Xingji Meizu Group China CMO Wan Zhiqiang stated at an event that the current sharp rise in memory prices is a huge blow to mobile phone business plans, and the Meizu 22 Air will cancel its launch plan. He revealed at the time that the Meizu 23 would still be released in 2026. However, according to reports, the project is no longer making substantial progress. 报道指出，星纪魅族集团中国区 CMO 万志强曾在活动上表示，当前内存的大幅上涨对手机商业计划是巨大的冲击，魅族 22 Air 将取消上市计划。其当时透露魅族 23 仍将在 2026 年发布。但据报道，该项目已经不再实质性推进。

The report also cited sources close to Meizu as saying that since April last year, Meizu has been unable to settle payments with many suppliers, and a large amount of outstanding debt has become bad debt, "Meizu's most likely outcome is to file for bankruptcy." 报道还援引接近魅族人士信息称，从去年 4 月开始，魅族已经有很多供应商的款项无法正常结算，至今仍有大量欠款已成为坏账，「魅族的结局大概率是申请破产。」

It is worth mentioning that the report revealed that Liu Yi, former general manager of Xiaomi's China e-commerce department, once joined Xingji Meizu Group under an alias, a move that also caused concern for Xiaomi. 值得一提的是，报道透露，前小米中国区电商部总经理刘毅曾以化名入职星纪魅族集团，而这一行为也曾引发小米担忧。

It is understood that Liu Yi, as an early core member of Xiaomi, has had a remarkable career. He served as Vice President of Sales for Xiaomi's International Department, responsible for business expansion in several important global markets, including India, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and Southeast Asia. 据悉，刘毅作为小米的早期核心成员，其职业生涯颇具亮点。他曾担任小米国际部销售副总裁，负责小米在全球多个重要市场的业务拓展，包括印度、欧洲、中东非及东南亚等地。

item.title: 英伟达新财报公布：继续增长，营收破 681 亿
item.guid: 英伟达新财报公布：继续增长，营收破-681-亿
item.description:
Early this morning, Nvidia officially released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2026: 今天凌晨，英伟达正式发布 2026 财年第四季度及全年财报：

In the fourth fiscal quarter ending January 25, 2026, Nvidia achieved total revenue of US$68.13 billion (approximately RMB 468.02 billion), a 20% quarter-on-quarter increase and a 73% year-on-year increase; GAAP net profit reached US$42.96 billion, a 94% year-on-year surge.

For the full fiscal year 2026, total revenue exceeded US$215.9 billion (approximately RMB 1.4831 trillion), a year-on-year increase of 65%.

Specifically, data centers remained the largest revenue contributor, reaching a record US$62.3 billion (approximately RMB 427.9 billion); while the consumer segment (gaming + AI PC) reached US$3.7 billion (approximately RMB 25.4 billion), a year-on-year increase of 47%. 具体来看，数据中心依然是营收大头——达到了创纪录的 623 亿美元（约合人民币 4279 亿元）；而消费级领域（游戏+AI PC）则达到了 37 亿美元（约合人民币 254 亿元），同比增长 47%。

Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang stated in the earnings report that "computing demand is growing exponentially, and the inflection point for Agentic AI has arrived." 英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋在财报声明中指出，「计算需求正呈指数级增长，智能体 AI（Agentic AI）的拐点已经到来」。

He stated that Grace Blackwell with NVLink is currently the "king of inference," and the next-generation Vera Rubin platform will further expand this leading edge. 其表示，搭载 NVLink 的 Grace Blackwell 是目前的「推理之王」，而下一代 Vera Rubin 平台将进一步扩大这一领先优势。

For the first quarter of fiscal year 2027, Nvidia provided revenue guidance of approximately US$78 billion (with a 2% fluctuation). 针对 2027 财年第一季度，英伟达给出约 780 亿美元（上下浮动 2%）的营收指引。

item.title: Anthropic 放弃核心 AI 安全承诺
item.guid: Anthropic-放弃核心-AI-安全承诺
item.description:
Recently, Anthropic officially released the third version of its "Responsible Scaling Policy" (RSP V3), announcing major reforms to its large model safety framework. 近期，Anthropic 正式发布第三版《责任扩展政策》（RSP V3），宣布对其大模型安全框架进行重大改革。

According to Time magazine, Anthropic has officially abandoned its original core safety commitment of "unilaterally pausing training." 而据《时代》周刊报道，Anthropic 正式放弃了原有的「单方面暂停训练」核心安全承诺。

It is understood that the core of this policy change is that Anthropic has canceled the previous rigid rule of "never training or releasing new AI models if appropriate risk mitigation measures cannot be ensured in advance." 据悉，此次政策变动的核心在于，Anthropic 取消了此前「若无法提前确保适当的风险缓解措施到位，则绝对不训练或发布新 AI 模型」的硬性规定。

As an alternative, Anthropic's new policy pledges that its safety measures will "match or exceed" those of its competitors and introduces a new information disclosure mechanism. Official documents show that the company will regularly publish a "Frontier Safety Roadmap" to detail future safety goals and simultaneously release "Risk Reports" to quantitatively assess the actual risk levels of all deployed models. 作为替代方案，Anthropic 在新版政策中承诺其安全措施将「持平或超越」竞争对手，并引入了全新的信息披露机制。官方文件显示，公司未来将定期发布《前沿安全路线图》以详细规划未来的安全目标，并同步公开《风险报告》，量化评估所有已部署模型的实际风险水平。

Company Chief Scientist Jared Kaplan stated in an interview that with competitors rapidly advancing, unilaterally stopping AI model training "does no one any good." 公司首席科学家 Jared Kaplan 在接受采访时表示，在竞争对手快速推进的情况下，单方面停止训练 AI 模型「对任何人都没好处」。

It is understood that Anthropic launched its RSP policy in 2023, aiming to prevent systemic risks of large models by setting absolute safety thresholds (such as ASL risk levels). 据了解，Anthropic 于 2023 年推出 RSP 政策，旨在通过设立绝对的安全门槛（如 ASL 风险等级）来防范大模型的系统性风险。

However, according to reports, with the escalating global AI arms race and surging model training costs, Anthropic's adherence to unilateral stringent restrictions has led the company to face the risk of falling behind in R&D progress in its commercial competition with giants like OpenAI and Google. 但据报道，随着全球 AI 军备竞赛加剧与模型训练成本激增，Anthropic 坚持单方面的严苛限制已导致公司在与 OpenAI、Google 等巨头的商业博弈中面临研发进度落后的风险。

item.title: 宝马售价大跳水，销量被曝跌回 7 年前
item.guid: 宝马售价大跳水，销量被曝跌回-7-年前
item.description:
According to Sina Finance, BMW has seen significant price reductions since the beginning of the year, with some models' bare car prices dropping by over 400,000 yuan compared to their guide prices. 据新浪财经消息，宝马在开年后迎来了较大的降价优惠，有车型的裸车价格相较于指导价降幅超 40 万元。

Specifically, taking the mainstream luxury 5 Series as an example, the 2025 BMW 530Li Exclusive M Sport Package has a guide price of 525,900 yuan, while its bare car price can reach 313,700 yuan, a reduction of over 210,000 yuan, a decrease of 40.3%. Older BMW 7 Series models have seen bare car prices drop by over 400,000 yuan compared to their guide prices. 具体来看，以主流豪华车型 5 系为例，2025 款宝马 530Li 尊享型 M 运动套装指导价 52.59 万元，裸车价能到 31.37 万元，降价超过 21 万元，降幅达到 40.3%，更有老款宝马 7 系其裸车价较指导价降幅超过 40 万元。

The report pointed out that in addition to model price reductions, since the second half of 2025, car owners in many parts of the country have successively received news of BMW 4S stores closing, including many long-established dealers that have been operating for years. 报道指出，除了车型降价，自 2025 年下半年以来，全国多地车主陆续收到宝马 4S 店关闭的消息，其中不乏一些经营多年的老牌经销商。

It is reported that Guanghui Auto, once the "king of 4S stores," had 37 BMW 4S stores under its umbrella successively revoked authorization in 2025. These stores were mainly distributed in Jiangsu, Zhejiang, Shanghai, and other core areas where BMW sales once thrived. Currently, only a very small number of stores retain repair centers or charging pile businesses to maintain basic operations. 据悉，曾经的「4S 店之王」广汇汽车，旗下 37 家宝马 4S 店在 2025 年被陆续撤销授权，这些门店主要分布在江苏、浙江、上海等宝马销量曾经的核心区域，目前仅剩极少数门店保留维修中心或充电桩业务维持基本运营。

According to BMW Group's 2025 financial report data, a total of 625,527 BMW and MINI brand vehicles were sold in the Chinese market throughout the year, a significant year-on-year decline of 12.5%. Compared to the peak of 825,000 units in 2023, nearly 200,000 units were lost in two years, with sales directly falling back to the level of seven years ago. 根据宝马集团公布的 2025 年财报数据，全年宝马在中国市场共售出 625527 辆 BMW 和 MINI 品牌汽车，同比大幅下滑 12.5%，较 2023 年的 82.5 万辆高点，两年间损失近 20 万辆，销量直接跌回 7 年前的水平。

item.title: 消息称阶跃星辰计划港股 IPO
item.guid: 消息称阶跃星辰计划港股-IPO
item.description:
According to Sina Technology, Jielue Xingchen is reportedly planning an IPO in Hong Kong. 据新浪科技消息，阶跃星辰据悉计划在港股 IPO。

It is reported that Jielue Xingchen recently announced the completion of its B+ round of financing, securing 5 billion yuan, setting a new record for a single financing round in the large model sector over the past 12 months. 据悉，阶跃星辰近期宣布完成 B+轮融资，获得 50 亿元融资，刷新大模型赛道过去 12 个月单笔融资纪录。

The report states that along with the disclosure of the financing results, the company also saw several important personnel changes, with Yin Qi, chairman of A-share listed company Chongqing Qianli Technology Co., Ltd., simultaneously taking on the role of chairman of the company. 报道称，伴随融资结果披露，公司也出现多则重要人事变动，A 股上市公司重庆千里科技股份有限公司董事长印奇也同步出任公司董事长。

In addition, Zhao Ming, former CEO of Honor, also announced his joining the board of directors of Qianli Technology and serving as co-chairman. 此外，荣耀前 CEO 赵明也宣布加盟千里科技董事会，并担任联席董事长职务。

item.title: 字节跳动估值达 5500 亿美元
item.guid: 字节跳动估值达-5500-亿美元
item.description:
According to Reuters, investment firm General Atlantic is planning to sell part of its stake in ByteDance, a transaction that would push the latter's valuation to a record $550 billion. 据路透社报道，投资机构泛大西洋投资集团正计划出售其持有的部分字节跳动股权，而此次交易将后者的估值推高至创纪录的 5500 亿美元。

Sources revealed that General Atlantic officially initiated the sale process for the relevant equity in recent weeks, and the transaction is expected to be completed in March this year. 知情人士透露，泛大西洋投资集团已于近几周正式启动相关股权的出售流程，预计该交易将于今年 3 月完成交割。

The report pointed out that based on the latest valuation of $550 billion, the pricing of this transaction represents a significant increase of 66% compared to ByteDance's official stock repurchase valuation of $330 billion last year, and an premium of approximately 15% compared to the $480 billion valuation during secondary market old share transfers in November last year. 报道指出，按 5500 亿美元的最新估值测算，此次交易定价较去年字节跳动官方股票回购时的 3300 亿美元估值大幅增长 66%，并较去年 11 月二级市场老股转让时的 4800 亿美元估值溢价约 15%。

item.title: 适马进军农业领域
item.guid: 适马进军农业领域
item.description:
Yesterday, Japanese optical equipment manufacturer Sigma officially announced its plan to establish a subsidiary, "Sigma Aizu Farm," on April 1, 2026, to launch an agricultural project centered on rice cultivation in the Aizu region. 昨日，日本光学设备制造商适马正式宣布，计划于 2026 年 4 月 1 日成立子公司「适马会津农场（Sigma Aizu Farm）」，在会津地区启动以水稻栽培为核心的农业项目。

It is reported that the newly established agricultural subsidiary will utilize the water and soil resources of Mount Bandai in the Aizu region for rice and buckwheat cultivation. The agricultural products from this project will not be sold to the external consumer market but are planned to be supplied exclusively to the employee canteens of the Sigma Aizu factory and the headquarters in Kawasaki City, Kanagawa Prefecture, to meet internal daily catering needs. 据悉，新成立的农业子公司将利用会津地区磐梯山的水土资源进行水稻及荞麦种植。该项目产出的农作物不面向外部消费市场发售，而是计划定向供应至适马会津工厂及神奈川县川崎市总部的员工食堂，以满足内部日常餐饮需求。

Sigma stated that venturing into agriculture is a substantive initiative aimed at maintaining the local ecological landscape. The company intends to transition its corporate role from "unilaterally benefiting from land resources" to "directly giving back to the regional ecosystem" by maintaining and reclaiming rice paddies and creating stable and traditional employment opportunities. 适马方面表示，跨界农业是一项旨在维持当地生态景观的实质性举措。公司意图通过维护和开垦水稻田，创造稳定且传统的就业机会，从而完成从「单向受惠于土地资源」向「直接回馈地区生态」的企业角色转变。

It is worth mentioning that the Aizu factory is currently Sigma's only production base globally, and it is also the cornerstone of Sigma's "Made in Aizu" brand strategy. 值得一提的是，会津工厂是适马目前在全球唯一的生产制造基地，该地也是适马品牌宣发中「Made in Aizu」战略的基石。

In recent years, similar to the situation in many remote areas of Japan, Aizu is facing severe challenges such as rapid population decline, agricultural labor shortages, and large-scale abandonment of cultivated land. 近年来，与日本众多偏远地区现状相似，会津正面临人口快速萎缩、农业劳动力短缺以及耕地大面积荒废等严峻挑战。

Sigma CEO Kazuto Yamaki has repeatedly emphasized the company's social responsibility to the Aizu region, pointing out that without the factory, the local town might face the risk of disappearing. 适马 CEO 山木和人此前曾多次强调企业对会津地区的社会责任，指出若无该工厂当地城镇可能面临消失风险。

item.title: 💡 来自 2028 的文章：AI 让裁员陷入死循环
item.guid: 💡-来自-2028-的文章：AI-让裁员陷入死循环
item.description:
Recently, investment research firm Citrini Research released a projection report titled "Global Intelligence Crisis in 2028," predicting that the widespread adoption of AI Agents will trigger a wave of white-collar unemployment and lead to a structural collapse of the global economy. 近期，投资研究机构 Citrini Research 发布题为《2028 年全球智能危机》的推演报告，预测 AI Agent（智能体）的大规模普及将引发白领失业潮并导致全球经济结构性崩盘。

🔗 Related reading: Fired you, saved money to buy AI, then fired another batch. How did this article from 2028 panic Wall Street? 🔗 相关阅读： 裁了你，省钱买AI，再裁一批，这篇来自 2028 的文章怎么让华尔街慌了

Interestingly, the report details the transmission path of this vicious cycle by constructing a "2028 Macro Hypothetical Model." 有趣的是，报告通过构建「2028 年宏观假想模型」，详细拆解了这一死循环的传导路径。

The model shows that in the first stage, companies introduce AI Agents to massively lay off knowledge-based and intermediary white-collar employees, significantly cutting labor costs, and achieving a surge in profit margins and financial report prosperity in the short term. However, the laid-off middle-class group is precisely the core cornerstone supporting the modern consumer economic system. 模型显示，在第一阶段，企业引入 AI Agent 大量裁撤知识型与中介型白领员工，大幅削减人力成本，短期内实现利润率激增与财报繁荣。然而，被裁撤的中产阶级群体恰恰是支撑现代消费经济体系的核心基石。

As the US unemployment rate in the model was pushed up to the warning line of 10.2%, macro aggregate demand experienced a structural collapse. 而伴随美国失业率在模型中被推高至 10.2% 的警戒线，宏观总需求出现结构性坍塌。

Due to a cliff-like drop in terminal consumption, corporate revenue plummeted; in order to maintain previous high profit margins and satisfy shareholders amidst shrinking income, companies were forced to initiate a new round of more aggressive AI-driven automated layoffs, thereby formally establishing the vicious cycle of "layoffs - demand contraction - revenue decline - more layoffs." 由于终端消费断崖式下跌，企业营收随之暴跌；为了在收入萎缩的困境中维持此前的高利润率及向股东交差，企业被迫开启新一轮更激进的 AI 自动化裁员，从而正式确立了「裁员-需求萎缩-营收下降-再裁员」的恶性闭环。

The report points out that throughout modern economic history, human intelligence has always been a scarce input factor. Everything can be copied or replaced, but only "intelligence" that can analyze, decide, create, persuade, and coordinate cannot be mass-replicated. 报告指出，在整个现代经济史中，人类智慧一直是稀缺的投入要素。一切都能复制或替代，但唯有能够分析、决策、创造、说服、协调的「智慧」，是没法大规模复制的。

The scarcity of human intelligence inherently carries an intrinsic premium, but machine intelligence is widely, even competently and rapidly improving, in replacing it. Fortunately, we are seeing this report in 2026. 人类智慧的稀缺性自带内在溢价，但机器智能正在广泛、甚至是合格且快速改进地替代着前者。好在的是，我们是在 2026 年看到这篇报告。

item.title: 微信上线找图功能
item.guid: 微信上线找图功能
item.description:
According to WeChat Pay's news yesterday, in the latest version of WeChat: 据微信派昨日消息，在最新版微信里：

Users simply long-press an image in a chat, click "View chats containing this image," to precisely track the "flow" of this image and see which individual or group chats it has been used in.

Tapping the list below also allows you to instantly locate the image's contextual position in a specific chat. 轻触下方的列表，还能一键定位到该图片在具体聊天中的上下文位置。

After our actual testing, we found that after selecting this feature, WeChat will directly display "This image has been used in the following X chats." 经过我们实测过后发现，选择该功能之后，微信会直接显示「此图片在以下 X 个聊天使用过」。

It is worth noting that in response to the "WeChat files repeatedly saving and consuming memory" issue, which has been widely criticized by users, WeChat officially took this opportunity to provide a clear response: 值得注意的是，针对此前备受用户吐槽的「微信文件重复保存吃内存」问题，微信官方此次也借机作出了明确回应：

When the same image, video, and file are used in multiple chats, they do not repeatedly occupy mobile phone storage space.

item.title: OPPO Find N6 或配备自修复记忆玻璃
item.guid: OPPO-Find-N6-或配备自修复记忆玻璃
item.description:
Yesterday, blogger "Digital Chat Station" posted that OPPO's new generation flagship foldable phone, the Find N6, might become the "world's flattest" foldable device. (Tested by TÜV Rheinland) 昨日，博主「数码闲聊站」发文称，OPPO 新一代旗舰折叠屏手机 Find N6 或成为「全球最平整」的折叠机。（由莱茵测试）

He pointed out that the reason is the two industry-leading black technologies debuted on the OPPO Find N6: "seamless titanium alloy hinge" + "self-healing memory glass." 其指出，原因是 OPPO Find N6 首发的「无痕钛合金铰链」+「自修复记忆玻璃」两项行业黑科技。

The blogger also revealed that "a certain international major manufacturer's foldable phone this year is also drawing inspiration from OPPO's solution, but is about half a year behind." 该博主还透露，「某国际大厂今年的折叠机也在借鉴 OPPO 的方案，但落后差不多半年」。

It is reported that the new phone will feature an 8.12-inch inner screen and a 6.62-inch outer screen. Previous reports indicate that the Find N6's crease depth will challenge industry limits, aiming for a visual appearance close to "absolute flatness" and a smoother tactile transition. 据悉，新机将配备 8.12 英寸内屏以及 6.62 英寸外屏。而据此前消息显示，Find N6 的折痕深度将挑战行业极限，目标是在观感上接近「绝对平整」，触感过渡也更顺滑。

In other aspects, the new phone is also expected to feature a 200-megapixel main camera, a periscope telephoto lens, and a multispectral lens, with a weight maintained at around 225g. 其他方面，新机还有望搭载 2 亿主摄、潜望长焦和多光谱镜头，重量保持在 225g 左右。

item.title: 阿里 Qwen3.5 开源模型家族扩容
item.guid: 阿里-Qwen3.5-开源模型家族扩容
item.description:
Yesterday, the Qwen large model officially open-sourced its latest medium-sized models for Qwen 3.5: Qwen3.5-35B-A3B, Qwen3.5-122B-A10B, and Qwen3.5-27B. Official introduction: 昨日，千问大模型正式开源千问 3.5 最新中等规模模型：Qwen3.5-35B-A3B 、Qwen3.5-122B -A10B 、Qwen3.5-27B。官方介绍：

  • The performance of Qwen3.5-35B-A3B has surpassed that of its larger-scale predecessors, Qwen3-235B-A22B-2507 and Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B; Qwen3.5-35B-A3B 的表现已超越前代更大规模模型 Qwen3-235B-A22B-2507 及 Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B；
  • Meanwhile, the Qwen3.5-122B-A10B and 27B versions have further narrowed the gap between medium-scale models and cutting-edge models, performing exceptionally well, especially in complex agent scenarios. 而 Qwen3.5-122B-A10B 与 27B 版本进一步缩小了中等规模模型与前沿模型的差距，尤其在复杂代理场景中表现优异。

Qwen stated that this indicates performance surpassing scale, no longer solely relying on parameter stacking, but rather driving intelligent development through architectural optimization, improved data quality, and reinforcement learning. 千问方面表示，这表明性能超越规模，不再单纯依赖参数堆叠，而是通过架构优化、数据质量提升及强化学习推动智能发展。

Specifically, Qwen3.5 adopts a hybrid attention mechanism, combined with highly sparse MoE architectural innovation, and is trained on a larger scale of mixed text and visual tokens. Qwen3.5-122B-A10B and Qwen3.5-35B-A3B achieve greater performance improvements with smaller total and active parameter counts. 具体来看，Qwen3.5 采用混合注意力机制，结合高稀疏的 MoE 架构创新，并基于更大规模的文本和视觉混合 Token 上训练，Qwen3.5-122B-A10B 与 Qwen3.5-35B-A3B 以更小的总参数和激活参数量，实现了更大的性能提升。

It is worth mentioning that Qwen3.5-27B, as the first dense model of Qwen3.5, has surpassed GPT-5 mini in multiple Agent evaluations such as tool calling, search, and programming; in various visual understanding rankings including visual reasoning, text recognition and understanding, and video reasoning, it has exceeded the Qwen3-VL flagship model and Claude Sonnet 4.5. 值得一提的是，Qwen3.5-27B 作为 Qwen3.5 首个密集（Dense）模型，在工具调用、搜索、编程等多个 Agent 评测中均超过了GPT-5 mini；在视觉推理、文本识别和理解、视频推理等多项视觉理解榜单中，超过了 Qwen3-VL 旗舰模型和 Claude Sonnet 4.5。

Currently, all three models have been open-sourced on ModelScope and Hugging Face. At the same time, we have also open-sourced the Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-Base foundational model. 目前，3 款模型均已在魔搭社区、Hugging Face 开源上线，同时，我们还一并开源了 Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-Base 基座模型。

item.title: Perplexity Computer 上线
item.guid: Perplexity-Computer-上线
item.description:
This morning, Perplexity officially announced the launch of its fully automated multi-agent orchestration system, "Perplexity Computer." 今早，Perplexity 正式宣布上线全自动多智能体编排系统「Perplexity Computer」。

According to reports, Perplexity Computer can automatically break down users' high-level instructions (covering the entire project workflow, including research, coding, and deployment) into subtasks, and simultaneously orchestrate up to 19 cutting-edge large models for collaborative execution in the background. 据介绍，Perplexity Computer 能够将用户宏观指令（包含研究、编码、部署等项目全流程）自动拆解为子任务，并在后台同步调度多达 19 款前沿大模型协同执行。

Specifically, Perplexity Computer can designate Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.6 as the core inference engine, while simultaneously calling Gemini for deep retrieval, Nano Banana for image generation, Veo 3.1 for video production, and Grok for handling lightweight, high-frequency tasks. 具体来看，Perplexity Computer 可以指定 Anthropic 的 Claude Opus 4.6 担任核心推理引擎，同时调用 Gemini 进行深度检索、Nano Banana 生成图像、Veo 3.1 制作视频以及 Grok 处理轻量化高频任务。

It is worth noting that, compared to the recently popular "OpenClaw," Perplexity emphasizes its "full cloud sandbox" isolation architecture, which ensures that when AI agents execute code or interact with web pages, their potential erroneous operations are strictly confined to a virtual environment, preventing infection of users' local devices and real internal networks. 值得一提的是，相比近期火爆的「OpenClaw」，Perplexity 强调其「全云端沙盒」隔离架构，能够确保 AI 代理在执行代码或网页交互时，其潜在的错误操作被严格限制在虚拟环境中，无法感染用户的本地设备与真实内网。

Currently, this feature is only available to top-tier "Max" level subscribers (priced at $200/month). 目前该功能仅面向顶配的「Max」级订阅用户（定价 200 美元/月）开放。

item.title: 精简版 OpenClaw？Claude Code 上线远程遥控
item.guid: 精简版-OpenClaw？Claude-Code-上线远程遥控
item.description:
Recently, Claude Code officially launched a new feature: remote control. 近期，Claude Code 正式上线了一个全新功能：远程控制。

Simply put, Claude Code with remote control will support opening web pages via a mobile app or any browser, allowing remote control of a locally deployed Claude Code to continue tasks. 简单来讲，拥有了远程控制的 Claude Code 将支持通过手机 App 或任意浏览器打开网页，远程控制本地部署的 Claude Code 继续任务。

This "people playing outside, AI busy at home" experience feels like the official streamlined version of OpenClaw. 而这种「人在外边玩，AI 在家忙」的体验，仿佛就是官方精简版的 OpenClaw。

Currently, this feature is only available to Max subscribers and will be extended to Pro subscribers in the future. 目前该功能仅面向 Max 订阅用户开放，未来将扩展至 Pro 订阅用户。

At the same time, Claude also launched a new Cowork update—a full-scenario "plugin" system and an exclusive private plugin marketplace. 同一时间， Claude 还上线了 Cowork 新的更新——全场景「插件」系统及专属私有插件市场。

Official technical documentation shows that the new Cowork plugin system allows enterprise administrators to package skill configurations, external connectors, and operational instructions through a unified custom dashboard to build dedicated AI agents for specific positions. 官方技术文档显示，新版 Cowork 插件系统允许企业管理员通过统一的定制看板，将技能配置、外部连接器及操作指令打包，构建针对特定岗位的专用 AI 智能体。

The system has added core-level native integration with platforms such as Google Workspace and DocuSign, and has taken the lead in enabling cross-application collaboration within the Microsoft ecosystem—Claude can now directly extract underlying data from Excel, automate analysis, and generate complete PPTs. 系统新增了对 Google Workspace、DocuSign 等平台的核心级原生接入，并率先打通了微软生态的跨应用协同——Claude 现可直接提取 Excel 中的底层数据，自动化分析并生成完整的 PPT。

It is worth mentioning that, to lower the deployment threshold, Anthropic officially launched over a dozen preset plugin templates covering highly specialized fields such as human resources, investment banking, private equity, and engineering design. 值得一提的是，为降低部署门槛，Anthropic 官方首发了十余款涵盖人力资源、投资银行、私募股权及工程设计等高度专业化领域的预置插件模板。

🔗 Related reading: Claude Cowork, watched by 49 million people, has gone wild again, with 10 top plugins launched, putting these workers at risk 🔗 相关阅读： 4900 万人围观的 Claude Cowork 又杀疯了，10 个顶级外挂上线，这些打工人危

item.title: PICO 官宣新品：或为新款 VR 头显
item.guid: PICO-官宣新品：或为新款-VR-头显
item.description:
Recently, PICO posted an article to preheat its new product, using the slogan "It's coming." 日前，PICO 发文预热新品，并打出「要来了」的文案。

Judging from the official announcement and news from "Ma Jiesi Jason," PICO OS Product Manager, the new product is likely a VR headset, emphasizing "efficiency, intuition, and openness." 从官方公布内容及 PICO OS 产品负责人「马杰思 Jason」的消息来看，新品或为 VR 头显设备，并且主打「高效、直觉、开放」。

In November last year, Yang Zhenyuan, Vice President of Technology at ByteDance, revealed that PICO would launch a new generation of products in 2026. 而在去年 11 月，字节跳动技术副总裁杨震原曾透露，PICO 将于 2026 年推出新一代产品。

The new product will be equipped with a full-link self-developed dedicated headset chip, capable of real-time processing of high-definition, high-frame-rate video with low latency and high precision, with a system latency of approximately 12 milliseconds. 新品将搭载全链路自研的头显专用芯片，能够低延迟、高精度地实现对高清高帧率视频的实时处理，系统延迟为 12 毫秒左右。

item.title: MiniMax 上线 MaxClaw 功能
item.guid: MiniMax-上线-MaxClaw-功能
item.description:
MiniMax Agent's Expert 2.0 and MaxClaw have just been officially announced. 刚刚，MiniMax Agent 的 Expert 2.0、MaxClaw 正式宣布上线。

According to reports, in Expert 2.0, MiniMax has further optimized the creation experience for expert Agents. Users do not need to consider the configuration of Skills, SubAgents, MCPs, or the structure of prompt words – they only need to describe the task goal or capability requirements in natural language, and the Agent will complete SOP梳理, tool orchestration, and capability configuration based on the goal. 据介绍，在 Expert 2.0 中，MiniMax 进一步优化了专家 Agent 的创建体验。用户不需要考虑 Skill、SubAgent、MCP 的配置，以及提示词的结构编排——只需用自然语言描述任务目标或能力需求，Agent 会根据目标完成 SOP 梳理、工具编排与能力配置。

The official announcement also previewed that in the next iteration, Expert 2.0 will introduce two capabilities: "creator pricing and revenue sharing mechanism" and "Expert sharing within teams." 官方还预告，下一代迭代中，Expert 2.0 将引入「创作者定价与分成机制」以及「团队内 Expert 共享」两项能力。

Regarding MaxClaw, the official introduction states that it is built on OpenClaw and directly integrated into the MiniMax Agent web interface, eliminating the need for users to provide their own servers or API Keys. MaxClaw 方面，官方介绍其基于 OpenClaw 构建，直接集成在 MiniMax Agent 网页端，无需自备服务器或 API Key。

Furthermore, compared to directly using OpenClaw, MaxClaw boasts advantages such as "pre-set curated expert-level Skills" and "comes with 50GB of dedicated cloud storage space." In the future, MaxClaw will also support "user-defined experts" and "multi-device collaboration" features. 并且相较于直接使用 OpenClaw，MaxClaw 拥有「预置精选专家级 Skill」「自带 50G 专属云储存空间」等优势。未来 MaxClaw 还将支持「用户自定义专家」「多端协同」的功能。

Both new features are currently available for use. 目前两项新功能均已开放使用。

item.title: 特斯拉推出「迷你储能站」充电宝
item.guid: 特斯拉推出「迷你储能站」充电宝
item.description:
Recently, Tesla officially launched a super mini energy storage station-shaped power bank – the Megapack Charger. 日前，特斯拉官方上线了一款超迷你储能站造型充电宝——Megapack 充电器。

The official description states that this power bank is modeled after the Megapack battery, with a 1:40 scale, built using authentic Megapack 3D CAD data, and features an openable operation room door. 官方介绍，该款充电宝以 Megapack 电池为原型进行打造，比例为 1:40，使用 Megapack 真品 3D CAD 数据打造，可开启操作间门。

In terms of specifications, the Megapack Charger has a battery capacity of 76.65Wh (21000mAh), can output a maximum of 108W simultaneously, features a 1A2C charging port configuration, and supports 65W input. 参数方面，Megapack 充电器拥有 76.65Wh 的电池容量（21000mAh），最大可同时输出 108W，拥有 1A2C 的充电口配置，支持 65W 输入。

It is currently available on the Tesla official website, priced at 709 yuan. 目前已上架特斯拉官网，售价 709 元。

item.title: Unity 或考虑出售中国业务
item.guid: Unity-或考虑出售中国业务
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, US 3D engine technology company Unity Software is evaluating various strategic options for its China business. 据彭博社报道，美国 3D 引擎技术公司 Unity Software 正在评估其中国业务的多种战略选项。

The report indicates that one of Unity's options is to hire consultants to assess the potential sale of its China business, with a target valuation exceeding $1 billion (approximately 6.8 billion yuan). 报道指出 Unity 其中一个选项为聘请顾问评估其中国业务的潜在出售事宜，目标估值超 10 亿美元（约合人民币 68 亿元）。

Sources familiar with the matter revealed that Unity has officially initiated market interest testing for its China business, with potential strategic options including a complete sale. 知情人士透露，Unity 已正式启动针对中国区业务市场意向的测试，潜在战略选项包括全面出售。

Currently, the internal target valuation for this business is set at over $1 billion. As discussions are still in an early, confidential stage, the final transaction form and whether it can be reached remain uncertain. 目前该业务的内部目标估值定为 10 亿美元以上，由于探讨尚处于早期保密阶段，最终交易形式与能否达成仍存变数。

It is worth mentioning that after Google officially released its latest AI model, Genie 3, recently, many voices began to worry about the disruptive impact of AI technology on the underlying traditional game development. 值得一提的是，近期 Google 正式发布了其最新 AI 模型 Genie 3 以后，便有不少声音开始担忧 AI 技术对传统游戏开发底层的颠覆性冲击。

item.title: Spotify × Liquid Death 打造「骨灰盒音箱」
item.guid: Spotify-×-Liquid-Death-打造「骨灰盒音箱」
item.description:
Recently, Spotify and the most attention-grabbing canned water brand Liquid Death have joined forces to create a very Next Level piece of hardware: 近日，Spotify 和最会搞事情的罐装水品牌 Liquid Death 强强联手，整出了一个很 Next Level 的硬件：

The Eternal Playlist Urn 永恒歌单骨灰盒（Eternal Playlist Urn）

The entire speaker has a minimalist pure white appearance, with a high-quality Bluetooth speaker built into the lid. It charges via a USB-C interface, and as long as it has power, the music can play continuously. 整个音箱为极简纯白的外观，盖子内置高音质蓝牙音箱，通过 USB-C 接口充电，只要不断电，音乐就能一直播。

It also features a Spotify-customized "underworld algorithm": by answering a few questions about "afterlife vibes" and combining them with the user's personal account listening history data, it can generate a unique "Eternal Playlist." 它还有 Spotify 定制的「阴间算法」：通过回答几个关于「来世氛围感」的问题，配合用户的个人账户历史听歌数据就能生成独一无二的「永恒歌单」。

In terms of price, the Eternal Playlist Urn sells for $495 (approximately 3500 RMB). 价格方面，永恒歌单骨灰盒售价 495 美元（约合人民币 3500 元）。

item.title: 《挽救计划》定档 3 月上映
item.guid: 《挽救计划》定档-3-月上映
item.description:
Recently, the sci-fi thriller "Project Hail Mary," starring Ryan Gosling and Sandra Hüller, has been scheduled for release in mainland China on March 20, simultaneous with North America. 日前，瑞恩 · 高斯林、桑德拉 · 惠勒主演的科幻惊悚片《挽救计划》中国内地定档 3 月 20 日，同步北美。

The film is adapted from the novel of the same name by Andy Weir, author of "The Martian" (Chinese translated title "Project Hail Mary"), directed by Phil Lord and Chris Miller ("The Lego Movie," "21 Jump Street"), and written by Drew Goddard ("The Martian"). 该片改编自《火星救援》原作安迪·威尔的同名小说（中文版译名《挽救计划》），菲尔·洛德和克里斯·米勒（《乐高大电影》《龙虎少年队》）执导，德鲁·高达（《火星救援》）编剧。

The film tells the story of Ryan waking up in a spaceship light-years away from Earth. As fragments of his memory piece together, a suffocating truth emerges: the sun is dying, Earth is in peril, and he, an ordinary teacher who usually stands at a podium, has been chosen to complete an 'impossible mission' alone. 影片讲述了瑞恩在距离地球数光年的飞船中醒来，随着记忆碎片拼合，一个令人窒息的真相浮出水面：太阳正在死去，地球危在旦夕，而他作为一个平日里站在讲台的普通老师，竟被选中独自完成一场「不可能的任务」的故事。

item.title: 《疯狂动物城 2》密钥再延期
item.guid: 《疯狂动物城-2》密钥再延期
item.description:
Yesterday, Disney announced that "Zootopia 2" will extend its theatrical run until March 25. 昨日，迪士尼电影宣布，《疯狂动物城 2》将延长放映至 3 月 25 日。

It is reported that this is the film's third extension, and its mainland box office has already surpassed 4.5 billion yuan on the 9th of this month. 据悉，本次已为该片第 3 次放映延长，同时影片已于本月 9 日内地票房突破 45 亿元。

"Zootopia 2" was released on November 26 last year. Notably, the film recently won the Best Animated Feature Film award at the 79th "British Academy Film Awards" (BAFTA). 《疯狂动物城 2》于去年 11 月 26 日上映。值得一提的是，影片还在近期获得第 79 届「英国电影学院奖」（BAFTA）最佳动画长片奖。

item.title: 《呼啸山庄》发布独家海报
item.guid: 《呼啸山庄》发布独家海报
item.description:
According to Sina Film, the movie "Wuthering Heights" recently released its exclusive Chinese poster. 据新浪电影消息，日前电影《呼啸山庄》发布中国独家海报。

The film revolves around a century-long tragic romance, where class and reality, worldly desires and ambitions, gradually consume these two lovers with similar souls. 影片围绕一场世纪绝恋展开，阶级与现实，世俗与欲望，将这两个灵魂相似的恋人逐渐吞噬。

The film is directed by Emerald Fennell, starring Margot Robbie and Jacob Elordi, and will be released in mainland China on March 13. 该片由埃默拉尔德·芬内尔执导，玛格特 · 罗比与雅各布 · 埃洛迪主演，中国内地将于 3 月 13 日上映。

早报
